{{WIP|Not coloured and design pending}}

==Legend==
{|class=wikitable
!Type
!Color Assignment
|-
|Event
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|
|-
|Snail Battle
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|
|-
|Reward
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|
|-
|Mine Pit
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|
|}

== Present - until Tile 40 ==
{| class="wikitable"
!rowspan=2;|Tile
!colspan=3; |First Encounter
!colspan=2; |Second Encounter
!rowspan=2;|Notes
|-
!Name
!Troop RUSH required Power
!Reward
!Name
!Reward
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|1
| Ferryman
| 12.00M
| T1 Nethrone Fang x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|2
| Miner
| 12.12M
| T1 Nethrone Bone x3
| [[#Mines|Mine]]
| 
| See linked table for mine requirements and rewards
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|3
| Ferryman
| 12.446M
| T1 Nethrone Bone x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|4
| Ferryman
| 12.58M
| T1 Nethrone Core x3
| Dry Riverbed
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Azoth|purple}} +20 Fragments
| Bury Ashes of Osiris from Tile 26 [[#Snail Fights|Journey of Liberation]]
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|5
| Ferryman
| 12.92M
| T1 Nethrone Core x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|6
| Ferryman
| 13.04M
| T1 Nethrone Fang x3
| Abandoned Fields 
| {{retext|ATK-Fungus|orange}}, Fungus Chest x100
| See [[#Time Travel|Past Kemet Domain]]. Requires planting 50k Fungus in the past
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|7
| Ferryman
| 13.27M
| T1 Nethrone Core x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|8
| Ferryman
| 13.38M
| T1 Nethrone Fang x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|9
| Hera
| 13.50M
| T1 Nethrone Bone x3
| [[#Snail Fights|Ace Divine General]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|10
| Desert Guards
| 13.84M
| T1 Nethrone Bone x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|11
| Desert Guards
| 13.96M
| T1 Nethrone Core x3
| 
|
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|12
| Desert Guards
| 14.07M
| T1 Nethrone Fang x4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|13
| Desert Guards
| 14.30M
| T1 Nethrone Bone x4
| Sphinx's Puzzle
| Neurolink x3
| Answers: B, A, C, B, A
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|14
| Desert Guards
| 14.19M
| T1 Nethrone Bone x4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|15
| Miner
| 14.65M
| T1 Nethrone Core x4
| [[#Mines|Mine]]
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|16
| Desert Guards
| 14.99M
| T1 Nethrone Core x4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|17
| Desert Guards
| 15.11M
| T1 Nethrone Fang x5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|18
| Vessoul Priest
| 15.22M
| T1 Nethrone Bone x5
| [[#Snail Fights|Nethrone Vessoul]]
| {{relink|Nethrone Vessoul|green}} Frag x1, Demon Chest x50
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|19
| Desert Guards
| 15.34M
| T1 Nethrone Core x5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|20
| Thanatos
| 15.45M
| T1 Nethrone Fang x5
| [[#Snail Fights|Thanatos]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|21
| Desert Guards
| 16.14M
| T1 Nethrone Fang x3
| 
| 
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|22
| Archaeologist
| 15.80M
| T2 Nethrone Bone x3
| Desert Ruins
| Kemetic Treasure Map x50
| Must submit 2 AR2-T2s in [[#Time Travel|Past Kemet Domain]]
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|23
| Oil Rig Manager
| 16.26M
| T2 Nethrone Bone x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|24
| Oil Rig Manager
| 16.49M
| T2 Nethrone Core x3
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|25
| Oil Rig Manager
| 16.60M
| T2 Nethrone Fang x3
| 
| 
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|26
| Tomb Keeper
| 17.06M
| T2 Nethrone Bone x3
| Tranquil Cemetery
| 
| [[#Time Travel|Past Kemet Domain]] - After defeating the [[#Snail Fights|Dam]] in the Past, can return to complete [[#Snail Fights|Journey of Liberation]] Battle Tower with 7 Floors
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|27
| Oil Rig Manager
| 16.37M
| T2 Nethrone Fang x3
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|28
| Miner
| 16.72M
| T2 Nethrone Bone x3
| [[#Mines|Mine]]
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|29
| Oil Rig Manager
| 16.95M
| T2 Nethrone Fang x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|30
| Shop Security
| 17.29M
| T2 Nethrone Bone x3
| 
| 
| Can only access the shop after collecting the "Heirloom" from [[#Time Travel|Past Kemet Domain]] Tile 29. See [[#Shops|Shop]] for contents.
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|31
| Oil Rig Manager
| 17.64M
| T1 Nethrone Bone x3
| 
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|32
| Coast Guard
| 17.87M
| T2 Nethrone Core x4
|
|
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|33
| Coast Guard
| 17.98M
| T2 Nethrone Fang x4
| 
| 
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|34
| Miner
| 18.10M
| T2 Nethrone Fang x4
| [[#Mines|Mine]]
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|35
| Oil Rig Manager
| 17.75M
| T2 Nethrone Core x4
| [[#Snail Fights|Super Rig]]
| Tool Chest x100<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
| After defeating the Oil Rig in the Past, changes to "Disappeared Rig"
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|36
| Coast Guard
| 18.90M
| T2 Nethrone Fang x3
| 83rd Shop Owner
| [[#Shops|Shop]]
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|37
| Coast Guard
| 18.44M
| T2 Nethrone Bone x4
| 
| 
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|38
| Coast Guard
| 8.98M
| T3 Nethrone Fang x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|39
| Coast Guard
| 18.79M
| T3 Nethrone Bone x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|40
| Coast Guard
| 19.25M
| T3 Nethrone Core x3
| 
| 
| '''Cannot proceed past this point without completing incidents in [[#Time Travel|Past and Future Kemet Domain]]''' 
|-
|}

== Time Travel - Until Present 40 ==

<tabber>
|-|Past=
{| class="wikitable"
!rowspan=2;|Tile
!colspan=3; |First Encounter
!colspan=2; |Second Encounter
!rowspan=2;|Notes
|-
!Name
!Troop RUSH required Power
!Reward
!Name
!Reward
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|2
| Supervisor
| 12.23M
| T1 Nethrone Core x3
| Potential Mine
| Expert Scroll x20, Ancient coin x300
| Submit 1x [[Fissure|Golden Pickaxe]]
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|4
| Supervisor
| 12.69M
| T1 Nethrone Fang x3
| [[#Snail Fights|Dam]]
| 30k B-Tads
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|6
| Landowner
| 13.15M
| T1 Nethrone Bone x3
| Sowable Land
| 
| Requires 50k Fungus
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|9
| Supervisor
| 13.61M
| T1 Nethrone Core x3
| Recruitment Instructions
| Superstar Ad Flyer x2
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|13
| Horse Thief
| 14.42M
| T1 Nethrone Core x4
| Sphinx's Puzzle
| Neurolink (Manhunt Brains) x3
| Answers: C, A, C, C, B
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|15
| Mine Owner
| 14.76M
| T1 Nethrone Fang x4
| Prospective Mine
| Master Scroll x20, Ancient Coin x300
| Requires 1 [[Fissure|Golden Pickaxe]]
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|20
| Archpriest
| 15.57M
| T1 Nethrone Bone x5
| Unused Altar
| W-Tads x200, Demon Chest x50
| Submit {{retext|Soul of Charisnake|red}}
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|22
| Horse Thief
| 15.91M
| T2 Nethrone Core x3
| Desert Ruins
| Refine Speedup x6h
| Requires 2 AR2-T2s
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|25
| Osiris
| 17.18M
| T2 Nethrone Core x3
| Controlled Nether King
| Offering Speedup x6h
| [[#Snail Fights|Osiris]]
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|29
| Horse Thief
| 17.41M
| T2 Nethrone Core x3
| Sponsor Wandering Trader
| Heirloom (Used on tile 30 in the Present), Badge x10
| Donate 50k B-Tadpoles
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 31
| Supervisor
| 17.87M
| T2 Nethrone Fang x3
| Newly Built Rig
| Star Stone x3, W-Tadpoles x500
| [[#Snail Fights|Wooden Oil Rig]]
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 35
| Supervisor
| 18.21M
| T2 Nethrone Core x5
| Potential Mine
| Expert Scroll x20, Ancient Coin x300
| Requires 1 [[Fissure|Golden Pickaxe]]
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 33
| Horse Bandit
| 19.02M
| T2 Nethrone Bone x3
| Founding Shop Owner
| 
| [[#Shops|Tile 33 (PAST)]] - Clearing shop allows xxx
|-
|}
|-|Future=
{| class="wikitable"
!rowspan=2;|Tile
!colspan=3; |First Encounter
!colspan=2; |Second Encounter
!rowspan=2;|Notes
|-
!Name
!Troop RUSH required Power
!Reward
!Name
!Reward
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 2
| Security Force 
| 12.35M
| T1 Nethrone Fang x3
| Depleted Mine
| Kemetic Treasure Map x50
| Requires the [[#Mines|Tile 2 (PRESENT)]] mine to be completed.
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 4
| Vessoul Priest
| 12.81M
| T1 Nethrone Bone x3
| [[#Snail Fights|Vessoul of Nethrone]]
| [[Vessoul of Nethrone]] Frag x1, Demon Chest x50
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 9
| Hera
| 13.73M
| T1 Nethrone Fang x3<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 13
| Security Force
| 14.53M
| T1 Nethrone Fang x4
| Sphinx
| Neurolink x3
| Answers: B A B C B
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 15
| Security Force
| 14.88M
| T1 Nethrone Bone x4
| Hungry Rebels
| Quantum Gel x600, Nether Essence x3
| Requires Escargot x50
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 20
| Thanatos
| 15.68M
| T1 Nethrone Core x5<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 22
| Security Force
| 16.03M
| T2 Nethrone Fang x3
| [[#Snail Fights|Awakened Robot]]
| [[Rocket#Robots|AR2-T4 Capsule]] x2
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 27
| Data Miner
| 16.83M
| Sim Token x1000, T2 Nethrone Core x3
|
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 29
| Security Force
| 17.52M
| T2 Nethrone Fang x3
| [[#Snail Fights|Franchise Store Manager]]
| Unknown Record x10, Soul of Merchant (2h)
| Must have retrieved the family heirloom from the past, sold out the shop in the present, then return to fight the enemy in the future
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 31
| Wind Power Engineer
| 17.98M
| T2 Nethrone Bone x3
| [[#Snail Fights|Giant Windmill]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 33
| Security Force
| 19.13M
| T2 Nethrone Core x4
| 100th Shop Owner
| 
| [[#Shops|Shop]]
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 35
| Vessoul Priest
| 18.33M
| T2 Nethrone Fang x4
| [[#Snail Fights|Vessoul of Nethrone]]
| {{relink|Nethrone Vessoul|green}} Frag x1, Demon Chest x50
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 40
| Supernatural Researcher
| 19.48M
| T3 Nethrone Bone x3
| Scientific Solution
| Blood, Research Briefcase
| 
|-
|}
</tabber>

==Present - Past Tile 40==

Sprinkle Blood from [[#Time Travel|Future Tile 40]] to unlock Tile 41 in the Present. This allows you to fight [[#Snail Fights|Master Zhong Kui]] on Tile 41 and gain {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1

{| class="wikitable"
!rowspan=2;|Tile
!colspan=3; |First Encounter
!colspan=2; |Second Encounter
!rowspan=2;|Notes
|-
!Name
!Troop RUSH required Power
!Reward
!Name
!Reward
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 42
| Magic Scorpion
| 19.59M
| T3 Nethrone Fang x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 43
| Magic Scorpion
| 19.71M
| T3 Nethrone Bone x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 44
| Magic Scorpion
| 19.82M
| T3 Nethrone Core x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 45
| Soul Restrainer
| 19.94M
| T3 Nethrone Fang x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 46
| Soul Restrainer
| 20.28M
| T3 Nethrone Fang x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 47
| Miner
| 20.40M
| T3 Nethrone Bone x3
| [[#Mines|Mine]]
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 48
| Magic Scorpion
| 20.74M
| T3 Nethrone Bone x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 49
| Soul Restrainer
| 20.86M
| T3 Nethrone Core x4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 50
| Magic Scorpion
| 21.20M
| T3 Nethrone Core x4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 51
| Magic Scorpion
| 21.32M
| T3 Nethrone Fang x4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 52
| Magic Scorpion
| 21.43M
| T3 Nethrone Bone x4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 53
| Yama
| 21.55M
| T3 Nethrone Core x4
| [[#Snail Fights|Yama]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 54
| Cactus
| 21.89M
| T3 Nethrone Core x5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 55
| Cactus
| 22.01M
| T4 Nethrone Fang x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 56
| Cactus
| 22.24M
| T4 Nethrone Core x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 57
| Cactus
| 22.35M
| T4 Nethrone Fang x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 58
| Construction Team
| 22.47M
| T4 Nethrone Bone x3
| [[#Snail Fights|Babel]]
| 
| 10 Floor Battle Tower
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 59
| Cactus
| 22.81M
| T4 Nethrone Bone x3
| Locked Vault
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Azoth|purple}} +20 Fragments<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
| {{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}}: 1314
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 60
| Miner
| 23.50M
| T4 Nethrone Fang x3
| [[#Mines|Mine]]
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 61
| Cactus
| 23.04M
| T4 Nethrone Fang x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 62
| Medical Doctor
| 23.16M
| T4 Nethrone Bone x3
| Medical Lab
| Organ Chest x50
| Must donate 50 organ slime in PAST Tile 62, then donate 50 organ slime here
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 63
| Death High Schooler
| 23.85M
| T4 Nethrone Bone x4
| [[#Snail Fights|Death High Schooler]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 64
| Priest of Nethrone
| 23.96M
| T4 Nethrone Bone x4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 65
| Traveler 11247
| 24.31M
| T4 Nethrone Core x4
| [[#Snail Fights|Traveler 11247]]
| Super Memetic Chest x20, {{retext|Soul of Traveler 11247|yellow}} (8h)
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 66
| Traveler 26633
| 24.42M
| T4 Nethrone Fang x4
| [[#Snail Fights|Traveler 26633]]
| Super Memetic Chest x20, {{retext|Soul of Traveler 26633|yellow}} (8h)
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 67
| Traveler 0985
| 24.54M
| T4 Nethrone Bone x4
| [[#Snail Fights|Traveler 0985]]
| Super Memetic Chest x20, {{retext|Soul of Traveler 0985|red}} (8h)
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 68
| Traveler 51101
| 24.65M
| T4 Nethrone Core x4
| [[#Snail Fights|Traveler 51101]]
| Super Memetic Chest x20, {{retext|Soul of Traveler 51101|red}} (8h)
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 69
| Traveler 30297
| 24.77M
| T4 Nethrone Fang x5
| [[#Snail Fights|Traveler 30297]]
| Super Memetic Chest x20, {{retext|Soul of Traveler 30297|blue}} (8h)
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 70
| Traveler 64241
| 24.88M
| T4 Nethrone Bone x5
| [[#Snail Fights|Traveler 64241]]
| Super Memetic Chest x20, {{retext|Soul of Traveler 64241|blue}} (8h)
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 71
| Nethrone
| 25.00M
| T4 Nethrone Core x5
| [[#Snail Fights|Nethrone]]
| {{relink|Nethrone's Head|green}}
| It is strongly recommended to backtrack at this point to get {{relink|Will's Spike|green}} from the Future
|-
|}

== Time Travel - From Present 41 ==

<tabber>
|-|Past=
{| class="wikitable"
!rowspan=2;|Tile
!colspan=3; |First Encounter
!colspan=2; |Second Encounter
!rowspan=2;|Notes
|-
!Name
!Troop RUSH required Power
!Reward
!Name
!Reward
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 45
| Soul Restrainer
| 20.05M
| T3 Nethrone Bone x3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 47
| Mine Owner
| 20.51M
| T3 Nethrone Core x3
| Potential Mine
| Expert Scroll x20, Ancient Coin x300
| Submit 1 Golden Pickaxe
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 49
| Soul Restrainer
| 20.97M
| T3 Nethrone Fang x4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 53
| Soul Restrainer
| 21.66M
| T3 Nethrone Fang x5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 55
| Vessoul Priest
| 22.12M
| T4 Nethrone Bone x3
| [[#Snail Fights|Vessoul of Nethrone]]
| {{relink|Nethrone Vessoul|green}} Frag x1, Demon Chest x50
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 58
| Supervisor
| 22.58M
| T4 Nethrone Core x3
| [[#Snail Fights|Babel (Past)]]
| 
| 5 Floor Battle Tower
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 60
| Supervisor
| 23.62M
| T4 Nethrone Bone x3
| Potential Mine
| Expert Scroll x20, Ancient Coin x300
| Submit 1 Golden Pickaxe
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 62
| Life Priest
| 23.27M
| T4 Nethrone Core x3
| Medical Lab
| Organ Chest x50
| Requires 50 Organ Slime - Event continues in Present 62
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 63
| Vessoul Priest
| 24.08M
| T4 Nethrone Core x3
| [[#Snail Fights|Vessoul of Nethrone]]
| {{relink|Nethrone Vessoul|green}} Frag x1, Demon Chest x50
| 
|-
|}

|-|Future=
{| class="wikitable"
!rowspan=2;|Tile
!colspan=3; |First Encounter
!colspan=2; |Second Encounter
!rowspan=2;|Notes
|-
!Name
!Troop RUSH required Power
!Reward
!Name
!Reward
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 45
| Security Force
| 20.17M
| T3 Nethrone Core x3
| Jailed Researcher
| {{relink|Will's Spike|green}}
| Destroy 6 soul prisons guarded by Soul Restrainers (If you've cleared all of the previous past, present, and future tiles, the last restrainer will be on tile 49 of the Future)
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 47
| Security Force
| 20.63M
| T3 Nethrone Fang x3
| Depleted Mine
| Kemetic Treasure Map x50
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 49
| Soul Restrainer
| 21.09M
| T3 Nethrone Bone x4
| Depleted Mine
| Kemetic Treasure Map x50
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 53
| Yama
| 21.78M
| T3 Nethrone Bone x5
| [[#Snail Fights|Yama (Future)]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 59
| Archaeologist
| 22.93M
| T4 Nethrone Core x5, {{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}} (1314)
| 
| 
| Gives the Password for Present Tile 59 and 3 Lotto Tickets
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 58
| Security Force
| 22.70M
| T4 Nethrone Fang x3
| [[#Snail Fights|Babel (Future)]]
| 
| 15 Floor Battle Tower
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 60
| Security Force
| 23.73M
| T4 Nethrone Core x3
| Depleted Mine
| Kemetic Treasure Map x50
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 62
| Medical Authority
| 23.39M
| T4 Nethrone Fang x4
| [[NPWT Technology]], Organ Chest x50
| 
| After donating organ slime in the past and present, can now donate 100k Healing Potion
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"| 63
| Death High Schooler
| 24.19M
| T4 Nethrone Fang x4
| [[#Snail Fights|Death High Schooler (Future)]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
| 
|-
|}
</tabber>

== Snail Fights ==
<tabber>
|-|General=
{| class="wikitable"
!Name !!Tile !!ATK !!DEF !!HP !!RUSH !!Special Stats !!Rewards
|-
|Vessoul of Nethrone (Future)
| 4
|87,238
|58,159
|2,156,735
|AFFCT 100,060
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|[[Vessoul of Nethrone]] Frag x1, Demon Chest x50
|-
|Dam (PAST)
|4
|85,575
|57,050
|2,106,416
|AFFCT 99,300
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|30k B-Tads
|-
|Hera
|9
|88,936
|59,291
|2,208,175
|AFFCT 101,240
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
|-
| Vessoul of Nethrone
|19
|92,262
|61,508
|2,274,245
|AFFCT 103,114
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{relink|Nethrone Vessoul|green}} Frag x1, Demon Chest x50
|-
|Thanatos
|22
|95,813
|63,875
|2,375,455
|AFFCT 105,050
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
|-
| Awakened Robot (FUTURE)
| 22
| 94,012
| 62,675
| 2,322,901
| AFFCT 103,870
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| [[Rocket#Robots|AR2-T4 Capsule]] x2
|-
|Osiris (PAST)
|25
|99,341
|66,227
|2,478,613
|AFFCT 106,970
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|Offering Speedup x6h
|-
| Franchise Store Manager (FUTURE)
| 29
| 162,435
| 108,290
| 4,344,103
| AFFCT 137,699
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Unknown Record x10, Soul of Merchant (2h)
|-
|Wooden Oil Rig (PAST)
| 31
|106,860
|71,240
|2,693,519
|AFFCT 110,752
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|Star Stone x3, W-Tadpoles x500
|-
| Giant Windmill (FUTURE)
| 31
| 110,506
| 73,671
| 2,798,456
| AFFCT 112,680
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
|-
|Steel Oil Rig
|32
|104,839
|69,893
|2,636,384
|AFFCT 109,886
|Invulnerability, Not covered by Life Insurance (Must defeat Wooden Oil Rig in [[#Time Travel|Past Kemet Domain]] to damage this opponent). 
|Tool Chest x100<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
|-
| Vessoul of Nethrone (FUTURE)
| 35
| 108,578
| 72,386
| 2,742,763
| AFFCT 111,660
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{relink|Nethrone Vessoul|green}} Frag x1, Demon Chest x50
|-
| Master Zhong Kui
| 41
| 110,393
| 73,595
| 2,795,178
| AFFCT 112,620
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
|-
| Yama
| 53
| 112,308
| 74,872
| 2,857,696
| AFFCT 113,592
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
|-
| Yama (FUTURE)
| 53
| 114,324
| 76,216
| 2,930,356
| AFFCT 114,576
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
|-
| Vessoul of Nethrone (PAST)
| 55
| 116,382
| 77,588
| 2,996,600
| AFFCT 115,581
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{relink|Nethrone Vessoul|green}} Frag x1, Demon Chest x50
|-
| Vessoul of Nethrone (PAST)
| 63
| 120,414
| 80,276
| 3,105,562
| AFFCT 117,557
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{relink|Nethrone Vessoul|green}} Frag x1, Demon Chest x50
|-
| Death High Schooler
| 63
| 122,472
| 81,648
| 3,161,258
| AFFCT 118,586
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
|-
| Death High Schooler (Future)
| 63
| 124,488
| 82,992
| 3,215,869
| AFFCT 119,594
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
|-
| Traveler 11247
| 65
| 126,504
| 84,336
| 3,270,530
| AFFCT 120,602
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Super Memetic Chest x20, {{retext|Soul of Traveler 11247|yellow}} (8h)
|-
| Traveler 26633
| 66
| 128,520
| 85,680
| 3,329,102
| AFFCT 121,615
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Super Memetic Chest x20, {{retext|Soul of Traveler 26633|yellow}} (8h)
|-
| Traveler 0985
| 67
| 130,578
| 87,052
| 3,403,958
| AFFCT 122,669
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Super Memetic Chest x20, {{retext|Soul of Traveler 0985|red}} (8h)
|-
| Traveler 51101
| 68
| 132,594
| 88,396
| 3,474,672
| AFFCT 123,701
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Super Memetic Chest x20, {{retext|Soul of Traveler 51101|red}} (8h)
|-
| Traveler 30297
| 69
| 134,610
| 89,740
| 3,529,575
| AFFCT 124,733
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Super Memetic Chest x20, {{retext|Soul of Traveler 30297|blue}} (8h)
|-
| Traveler 64241
| 70
| 136,658
| 91,105
| 3,585,964
| AFFCT 125,765
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Super Memetic Chest x20, {{retext|Soul of Traveler 64241|blue}} (8h)
|-
| Nethrone
| 71
| 140,000
| 95,000
| 16,500,000
| AFFCT 127,850
| {{list|CRIT +100%|Crit DMG -40%|HIT +80|Paralysis RES +80%}}
| {{relink|Nethrone's Head|green}}
|-
|}


|-|Journey of Liberation=
{|class="wikitable"
!Name !!ATK !!DEF !!HP !!RUSH !!Special Stats !!Rewards
|-
| Sobek
| 85,575
| 57,050
| 2,106,416
| AFFCT 99,100
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Soul Chest x50
|-
| Bastet
| 88,451
| 58,967
| 2,193,470
| AFFCT 100,760
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Soul Chest x50
|-
| Set
| 91,362
| 60,908
| 2,256,651
| AFFCT 102,407
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Soul Chest x50
|-
| Isis
| 94,343
| 62,895
| 2,332,549
| AFFCT 104,050
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Soul Chest x50
|-
| Imset
| 97,393
| 64,929
| 2,421,629
| AFFCT 105,710
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Soul Chest x50
|-
| Geb
| 100,498
| 66,998
| 2,512,134
| AFFCT 107,390
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Soul Chest x50
|-
| Soul of Osiris
| 107,520
| 71,680
| 2,712,213
| AFFCT 111,100
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Ashes of Osiris, W-Tad x500
|-
|}


|-|Babel=
{|class="wikitable"
!Name !!ATK !!DEF !!HP !!RUSH !!Special Stats !!Rewards
|-
| Gun Tower
| 92,505
| 61,670
| 2,278,982
| AFFCT 103,050
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| Gun Tower
| 95,776
| 63,851
| 2,374,381
| AFFCT 104,830
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| Gun Tower
| 99,047
| 66,031
| 2,470,007
| AFFCT 106,610
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| Gun Tower
| 102,388
| 68,258
| 2,566,463
| AFFCT 108,390
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| Gun Tower
| 105,811
| 70,540
| 2,663,844
| AFFCT 110,198
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| Gun Tower
| 109,183
| 72,789
| 2,760,228
| AFFCT 111,980
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| Gun Tower
| 112,686
| 75,124
| 2,871,311
| AFFCT 113,777
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| Gun Tower
| 116,424
| 77,616
| 2,997,733
| AFFCT 115,601
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| Gun Tower
| 120,162
| 80,108
| 3,098,746
| AFFCT 117,431
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| Howitzer Turret
| 123,900
| 82,600
| 3,199,936
| AFFCT 119,300
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20, W-Tad x1000
|-
|}

|-|Babel (Past)=
{|class="wikitable"
!Name !!ATK !!DEF !!HP !!RUSH !!Special Stats !!Rewards
|-
| Soldier Statue
| 99,855
| 66,570
| 2,493,678
| AFFCT 107,050
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| Soldier Statue
| 103,635
| 69,090
| 2,602,356
| AFFCT 109,050
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| Soldier Statue
| 107,520
| 71,680
| 2,712,213
| AFFCT 111,100
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| Soldier Statue
| 111,300
| 74,300
| 2,821,408
| AFFCT 113,100
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| General Statue
| 115,500
| 77,000
| 2,972,792
| AFFCT 115,150
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20, W-Tad x500
|}

|-|Babel (Future)=
{|class="wikitable"
!Name !!ATK !!DEF !!HP !!RUSH !!Special Stats !!Rewards
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 85,575
| 57,050
| 2,106,416
| AFFCT 99,100
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 88,555
| 59,037
| 2,196,621
| AFFCT 100,820
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 91,500
| 61,000
| 2,259,357
| AFFCT 102,485
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 94,600
| 63,067
| 2,340,054
| AFFCT 104,190
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 97,760
| 65,174
| 2,432,375
| AFFCT 105,910
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 100,961
| 67,301
| 2,525,167
| AFFCT 107,630
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 104,179
| 69,453
| 2,617,720
| AFFCT 109,337
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 107,520
| 71,680
| 2,712,213
| AFFCT 111,100
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 110,771
| 73,847
| 2,806,106
| AFFCT 112,820
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 114,282
| 76,188
| 2,928,841
| AFFCT 114,556
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 117,894
| 78,596
| 3,037,436
| AFFCT 116,319
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 121,506
| 81,004
| 3,135,109
| AFFCT 118,103
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 125,118
| 83,412
| 3,232,945
| AFFCT 119,909
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| T600 Defense Robot
| 128,688
| 85,792
| 3,335,209
| AFFCT 121,701
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20, Kemetic Treasure Map x20
|-
| TX Defense Robot
| 132,300
| 88,200
| 3,466,670
| AFFCT 123,550
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| Demon Chest x20<br>Kemetic Treasure Map x20<br>W-Tad x1500<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Azoth|purple}} +20 Fragments
|}

</tabber>

== Shops ==
<tabber>
|-|Tile 30 (PRESENT)=
{| class="wikitable"
!Item !!Cost in {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}
|-
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Orb|orange}}
| 1500
|-
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin, +3|orange}}
| 1000
|-
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}
| 500
|-
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Master Scroll, +40|orange}}
| 1200
|-
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Azoth|purple}} +20 Fragments
| 1000
|-
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Nether Moon}} +1
| 200
|}
|-|Tile 33 (FUTURE)=
{| class="wikitable"
!Item !!Cost
|-
|{{reimg|CRISPR|30}}{{relink|CRISPR|orange}}
|300k B-Tads
|-
|{{reimg|Leyden Jar|30}}{{relink|Leyden Jar|purple}}
|120k B-Tads
|-
|{{reimg|Earth Magnetic Field|30}}{{relink|Earth Magnetic Field|blue}}
|60k B-Tads
|-
|Drone x2
|30k B-Tads
|-
|{{reimg|Glue|30}}Glue x50
|40k B-Tads
|-
|Nether Essence x3
|30k B-Tads
|}
|-|Tile 36 (PRESENT)=
{| class="wikitable"
!Item !!Cost
|-
|{{reimg|Wealth Magazine Vol.1|30}}{{relink|Wealth Magazine Vol.1|orange}}
|300k B-Tads
|-
|{{reimg|View of Le Gras|30}}{{relink|View of Le Gras|purple}}
|120k B-Tads
|-
|{{reimg|The Final Communique|30}}{{relink|The Final Communique|blue}}
|60k B-Tads
|-
|Sunny Plant Food
|120k B-Tads
|-
|{{reimg|Glue|30}}Glue x50
|40k B-Tads
|-
|Nether Essence x3
|30k B-Tads
|}
</tabber>

== Mines ==
{| class="wikitable"
! Tile !! Minions Required!! Rewards !! Time
|-
|2
|T6 760
|Kemetic Treasure Map x900<br>Dragon Chest x600<br>Nether Essence x4
|1d 7h 20m
|-
|15
|T6 x70
|Kemetic Treasure Map x900<br>Lottery Ticket x18<br>Nether Essence x4
|1d 7h 20m
|-
|28
|T6 x70
|Kemetic Treasure Map x1000<br>Nether Essence x5<br>[[Incense]] x1
|1d 10h 46m
|-
|34
|T6 x70
|Kemetic Treasure Map x1000<br> Demon Chest x600<br> Nether Essence x5
|1d 10h 46m
|-
|47
|T6 x70
|Kemetic Treasure Map x1000<br> Lottery Ticket x22<br> Nether Essence x6
|1d 14h 15m
|-
|60
|T6 x70
|Kemetic Treasure Map x1000<br> Nether Essence x6<br> Dragon Orb x1
|1d 14h 15m
|-
|}

== Moon Shop ==

{| class="wikitable"
!Item !!Cost
|-
|{{Retext|T3 Nethrone Fang|blue}} +50
|{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}
|-
|{{Retext|T3 Nethrone Bone|blue}} +50
|{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}
|-
|{{Retext|T3 Nethrone Core|blue}} +50
|{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +20h}}
|{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad, +3k}}
|{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wormhole Refiner, +500}}
|{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Sunny Plant Food, +6|orange}}
|{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithGearlink|orange|Material|Crystal of Will}}
|{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}
|-
|After Domain is 100%<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Kemet Nebula Pack|orange}} ({{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +2k}} and {{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +2|orange}})
|{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Nether Moon}}
|}
[[Category:Kemetic Domain]]
